feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Linking SAP analytics cloud to SAP HANA cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am following the helpline document's step to connect my SAP Analytics Cloud to SAP Hana cloud using live connection. But I am not able to do the same as I believe that I dont have the admin access to the free trial account I created for SAP Analytics Cloud. It shows this:

Can anyone help me here with live connection here or maybe guide me towards the resolution.

Thanks,

Mayank Jha

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Copy Data to specific Dimension Elements
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a Dimension with the following elements: A, A1, B, B1, C, C1. It's a public dimension with properties.

For the master data of Dimension Elements A, B, and C, we have entries in the properties:

A = A1, B = B1, C = C1

We also have transactional data for A, B, and C, and we want to copy these values to their corresponding counterparts, which are specified in the properties.

Does anyone have an idea on how to set up an advanced formula for this without hard-coding, such as:

DATA(A1)=RESULTLOOKUP(A)

I'm looking for a more dynamic solution. Any suggestions?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: DM_SCHEDULE not displaying the Job End time
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have some import jobs to load fact data in SAC Planning model. We are also monitoring the jobs last run via DM_SCHEDULE model report. This model provided by SAP and it helps to monitor the Data management jobs. It's showing Null for Job end time and job start time. It worked before the SAC Q3 Upgrade. Anyone facing this issue ?

entry.title: Is there a way to display SAC currency conversion rate Table into SAC Story with Category?
SAC Planning for Expenses based on Income ratio for the store
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a requirement for Expenses planning to happen storewise using the microsoft excel add-in.
Based on the total sales value of the store, the value of each expense GL A/c needs to be divided against the total sales value.  

CURRENT

Expected calculation is shown below 
(GL Expense/ Sales of that store)

Note - I do know there is a way to write the formula for each GL A/c and divide it by the Income GL group (in the GL Dimension)
But this would be hardcoding the formula for each GL A/c.

Hence, is there a way for the calculation to take the Storewise amount present in the row & divide it by the storewise sales GL grouping, without having the need to hardcode the value for each Expense GL Account ?

@N1kh1l  any inputs in terms of achieving this requirement ?

So that whatever GL's the user selects in the filters & those are visible in the rows, system can divide that by the Income GL group for the store?

 

Regards,
Gavin.

entry.title: exportView issue in story with Optimized design Experience
entry.content:
Hello SAC experts,

I am developping a story with Optimized Design Experience (and a new model) and for many reasons, I use scripting to export the story in PDF.
But, when a user select the "cancel" button in the SAC's automatic export message (popUp)
(
 this one)
the processus is breaking  (fortunately) but :
       - the script seems as broken :
                            > I tried to catch the boolean result of the API "exportView" but it is impossible to catch it (> impossible to use a mere "consol.log" to display the value)

        - and the story is freezed :
                           > no action or interaction is possible.

So, I think that is a big API bug from SAP analytics Cloud but does anyone have a workarround's idea, please ?
Thanks, in advance, for your valuable help.

entry.title: Dynamic Date Selection in Stories
entry.content:
Hi, guys!

Please advise, I correctly understood that in Dynamic Date Selection "Last day of ......" (as in Canvas report) are absent?

Thank you!

entry.title: SAC live BW Query variable not applying from URL
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I am working with SAC in a BW live connection environment. I wonder whether it is possible to configure the URL to input the variable values for the BW query prompt I use in the SAC story.

I have tried checking this forum, but it's not clear to me whether it is only possible with variables set in the SAC model or if it is possible with the variables from the BW query itself.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/query-variable-not-applying-from-url/qaq-p/12698172

I've tried it, and I have not been able to do it. I would like to know if it's technically not possible to input values in the URL for a BW query, so I can stop testing :).

 

Best regards,

entry.title: YTD Calculation in SAC Excel Add in Using GETDATA()
entry.content:
We want to calculate YTD AMOUNT in SAC Excel ADD in.

Currently Excel add is not supporting multiple selection is , is there any workaround?


SAP.GetData("DS_1","YEAR","2024", "Mnth","01,02,03,04,05,06.07")

We are using this for a connection to SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC),

entry.title: Why I can not use date/time dimension as linked dimension in optimized mode?
entry.content: when I convert classic mode story to the optimized mode story, it shows the error. Why I can not use date/time dimension as linked dimension in optimized mode? #sap analytics cloud#

entry.title: Post recent SAC upgrade, getting below error while opening report.
entry.content:
Preview
Post recent SAC upgrade, getting below error while opening report.
How to fix it?
[Application Error]:Converting circular structure to JSON
--> starting at object with constructor 'n'
| property 'children' -> object with constructor 'Array'
| index 0 -> object with constructor 'n'
--- property 'parent' closes the circle
Correlation ID: 37378367-4581-4604-b232-089496631124

entry.title: Slowness in loading SAC - ODE story contents
entry.content:
Hi Colleagues,

At the beginning of this year,  as department we started conversion of all stories into new Optimized Design Experience mode, we successfully converted all of them  however currently we experience  slowness of content  uploading in some ODE stories, sometimes it becomes worse, we could not work on the stories in editing mode. Furthermore, we've been getting complaints recently. 

What should I do make it faster, I am open any suggestions and idea to solve this issue ASAP.  If it is neede also we can have short call to check issue together

Thanks a lot in advance!

#SAC #SAPanalyticscloud #OptimizedDesignExperience

Best Regards.

Ali Akbalik

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - public vs private tenants
entry.content:
Hi all,

SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere are both part of SAP BTP. With SAP Analytics Cloud, we have the option of purchasing private tenant licenses, or public tenant licenses, where system resources are shared between multiple customers using the same tenant. 

Does the same option exist for SAP Datasphere?

Thanks,

Hugh

entry.title: SAC Rolling 12 Months with Live Connection
entry.content:
Hi,

I’ve reviewed various community posts and KBAs regarding rolling 12-month calculations in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). However, I haven’t found a solution meets what we are trying to achieve.

In our setup, SAC is connected with a live connection to Datasphere, which includes HR data. I've attached the calculation logic that would support the chart, along with an example of how we envision the chart to look.

Requirements for the Rolling 12-Month Chart:

  • The chart should display a 12-month average, starting showing the aggregation from the first data point. For example, in the case of August 2023, the chart should include data from September 2022 to August 2023 and continue through to the end of the 12-month period (e.g., July 2024). If a time build-up is necessary (as it is when using Simple Rolling Months), is it possible to hide this initial build-up phase?
  • Ideally, we want to offer users the ability to adjust the 12-month period using a date filter. For example, they should be able to change the range from August 2023 - July 2024 to April 2023 - March 2024.

If the above is not possible, what would be an alternative solution?

Thank you.

Best regards.

entry.title: Datasphere performance issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

   I am facing some performance issues with datasphere modeling. Here is my design structures:

Background: We have to create SAC report based on COPA Actual/Plan Data and some other External Data as well.

Modeling Steps refer to above:

1. Preload COPA Actual Data(20 M Records), Budget Data(1 M Records), External Data(10 K Records) to local Table and store table data in memory. Then create views based on local tables and make projections to reduce the no. of columns. Filters and Aggregations are also applied to reduce the total no. of records.

2. Use Input parameters to limit amount of data access.

3. Create UNION for Actual and Plan data

4. Create UNION for External data and above(3)

5. Aggregation based on final data structure

6. Various Calculated column(simple calculation) created

7. Fact source view created(Measures: 110 / Attribute: 45) and used by Analytic Model. Till this point, no. of records have reduced to 2M

SAC then use this Analytic Model for Reporting

Now here comes the trouble: 

1. When I Preview data in the Analytic Model, it takes 30~40 seconds to show the result, the acceptable response time is within 10 secs.

2. While the model is consumed by SAC, as we create more calculations(YTD, Last year YTD...etc) SAC crashes.

Is there any suggestion for performance improvement ?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Receiving "Destination Host is unreachable!" error when executing SAC stories using HANA Live
entry.content:
The Stories are terminated with "Destination Host is unreachable!" error when we ran stories ran in multiple sessions. The stories contains only table data and no graphs are involved.

We haven't faced any issues with single execution and more over issue mainly started after July 3rd 2024 SAC patch upgrade. Issue is also with few reports where we can cross calculations involved.

We are unable to replicate the error in Test system and issue is intermittent at the Production environment.

All our connections are live and using HANA XSA as a backend system. Running the SAC stories using Chrome and Edge browser.

Please answer :

1. If any one else is facing the issue ?

2. What version the issue started ?

3. What is the backend Source you are using ?

4. Any Possible work around or solution that can be implemented .

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud for planning #Crosscalulation  #Stories SAP Analytics Cloud, augmented analytics SAP HANA streaming analytics SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud SAP HANA, express edition SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling SAP Cloud Integration for data services SAP Data Intelligence SAP Predictive Analytics

entry.title: How to do a lookup of a field in another model in SAC
entry.content:
From Model 2 the "TYPE" Field has to be taken and filled in the "LOOKUP FIELD" in the Model 1.

Can anyone please let me know how this can be done?

Yes we can have the TYPE as attribute in a dimension table. But just wanted to know how this can be done in the Advanced Formula.

Please forgive me if it is basic question.

entry.title: How to pass promp in SAC in case the source is Datasphere
entry.content:
Hey Guys 

I want to navigate from one story to another and also pass the variables but I cannot find a good solution for that.

I saw this blog post how to do it with normal model but this guide require me to get a model ID but I belive in case of Datasphere I do not have one.

https://cubis.be/sap-analytics-cloud-open-your-story-with-a-variable-constraint-via-a-url/

Do you know any alternative solution that works with datasphere ? 

Thanks Andris

entry.title: Replace NULL with dash or blank in column with type 'Date' in SAC
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there any way to convert null values of Date type Dimension with dash ('-') or blank (' ') in SAP Analytics Cloud?

I tried creating Calculated Dimension, but I've got an error: Dimension of type 'date' cannot be used in Calculated Dimension. Also, I've tried to convert date to string but function TOTEXT() is not allowed for Date type.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Embedding of SAC Stories in SAP Fiori for S/4 HANA on premise
entry.content:
Dear all, 

is it still possible to embedd  SAC Stories (with live data connection to S/4 HANA) into SAP Fiori for S/4 HANA on premise via iframe? I can only find old information on that with links and videos that are partly broken. If yes, could you please provide a link to the documentation? The use case would be to combine the nice look&feel of SAC with the intent-based navigation of Fiori (yes, we have SAC licences). 

BR, Daniel
